exam_name: CSET Mathematics Subtest I (Algebra & Number Theory)
exam_price_notes: $99 per subtest. CSET Math requires Subtests I, II, and III for Single Subject credential ($297 total). 45-day wait between retakes.
exam_rules: Review the list of materials that are prohibited at the test center. When you register, you agree to abide by all testing policies and rules. Read them now.
target_audience: Candidates seeking a Single Subject Teaching Credential in Mathematics

prerequisites.description: Required to demonstrate subject matter competence for California math teaching credential

retake_policy.notes: If you have previously passed one or more subtests of the CSET: Mathematics examination prior to December 29, 2014, your scores will remain valid and you will not have to retake those subtests.

domains.name: CSET: Mathematics Subtest I (Algebra & Number Theory)

official_study_resources.notes: Review the test structure for CSET: Mathematics.
